# CWE-924 positive: webhook without integrity check (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-924-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-924: Message integrity not verified on inbound payment webhook.
// Vulnerable: JSON body trusted without HMAC validation.

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type PaymentEventPure struct {
	InvoiceID string  `json:"invoice_id"`
	Amount    float64 `json:"amount"`
}

func AcceptWebhookPure(db *sql.DB) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		var evt PaymentEventPure
		if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&evt); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		_, err := db.Exec(
			"UPDATE invoices SET paid = true, amount = $1 WHERE id = $2",
			evt.Amount, evt.InvoiceID,
		)
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
			return
		}
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.Write([]byte(`{"status":"applied"}`))
	}
}
